title: Develop conservation strategies for cultural resources
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop conservation strategies for cultural resources demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Define components of cultural heritage significance

pcs.text: Define and record geographic and operational boundaries for conservation policy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define and record geographic and operational boundaries for conservation policy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define and record geographic and operational boundaries for conservation policy.

pcs.text: Review and collate results of studies of cultural significance for places and areas within the boundaries to develop park, reserve or region significance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review and collate results of studies of cultural significance for places and areas within the boundaries to develop park, reserve or region significance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review and collate results of studies of cultural significance for places and areas within the boundaries to develop park, reserve or region significance.

pcs.text: Develop limits of acceptable change in the form of deterioration and damage to the places of cultural significance according to legislative and organisational requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop limits of acceptable change in the form of deterioration and damage to the places of cultural significance according to legislative and organisational requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop limits of acceptable change in the form of deterioration and damage to the places of cultural significance according to legislative and organisational requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Define components of cultural heritage significance

elements.title: Review past strategies, plans and activities

pcs.text: Compare and document previous strategies and plans with collated assessment of significance to determine compatibility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare and document previous strategies and plans with collated assessment of significance to determine compatibility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare and document previous strategies and plans with collated assessment of significance to determine compatibility.

pcs.text: Review current activities in the area to assess their compatibility with the collated assessment of significance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review current activities in the area to assess their compatibility with the collated assessment of significance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review current activities in the area to assess their compatibility with the collated assessment of significance.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document areas of incompatibility.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Review past strategies, plans and activities

elements.title: Review current and potential resource uses

pcs.text: Assess and document impact of current uses of the cultural resources against the set limits of acceptable change to determine success of conservation approach
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and document impact of current uses of the cultural resources against the set limits of acceptable change to determine success of conservation approach?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and document impact of current uses of the cultural resources against the set limits of acceptable change to determine success of conservation approach.

pcs.text: Assess feasible uses of resources against client requirements and report to management
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess feasible uses of resources against client requirements and report to management?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess feasible uses of resources against client requirements and report to management.

pcs.text: Develop possible changes to resource use to ensure sustainability of cultural values and environment and record
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop possible changes to resource use to ensure sustainability of cultural values and environment and record?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop possible changes to resource use to ensure sustainability of cultural values and environment and record.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Review current and potential resource uses

elements.title: Identify threats to cultural places

pcs.text: Identify and record threats to cultural significance and the environment both external and internal to the area under consideration
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record threats to cultural significance and the environment both external and internal to the area under consideration?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record threats to cultural significance and the environment both external and internal to the area under consideration.

pcs.text: Conduct and document a risk assessment of all threats to determine potential impact on strategies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct and document a risk assessment of all threats to determine potential impact on strategies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct and document a risk assessment of all threats to determine potential impact on strategies.

pcs.text: Document policy changes required to address the threats
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document policy changes required to address the threats?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document policy changes required to address the threats.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Identify threats to cultural places

elements.title: Develop strategies for management of cultural resource

pcs.text: Develop draft policy to address the cultural significance that meets any shortfalls in previous strategies, allows for compatible resource uses and addresses risks associated with any threats to the cultural values of the area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop draft policy to address the cultural significance that meets any shortfalls in previous strategies, allows for compatible resource uses and addresses risks associated with any threats to the cultural values of the area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop draft policy to address the cultural significance that meets any shortfalls in previous strategies, allows for compatible resource uses and addresses risks associated with any threats to the cultural values of the area.

pcs.text: Review policy to ensure compliance with Burra Charter guidelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review policy to ensure compliance with Burra Charter guidelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review policy to ensure compliance with Burra Charter guidelines.

pcs.text: Conduct consultations with stakeholders on draft policy in accordance with legislative, organisational and good practice requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct consultations with stakeholders on draft policy in accordance with legislative, organisational and good practice requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct consultations with stakeholders on draft policy in accordance with legislative, organisational and good practice requirements.

pcs.text: Ensure consultations comply with cultural protocols and organisational approaches to stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure consultations comply with cultural protocols and organisational approaches to stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure consultations comply with cultural protocols and organisational approaches to stakeholders.

pcs.text: Finalise management strategies to reflect stakeholder views as required in legislation, government policies, organisational strategies and procedures, and environmental sustainability requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Finalise management strategies to reflect stakeholder views as required in legislation, government policies, organisational strategies and procedures, and environmental sustainability requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Finalise management strategies to reflect stakeholder views as required in legislation, government policies, organisational strategies and procedures, and environmental sustainability requirements.

pcs.text: Submit strategies for approval to legislative and organisational requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Submit strategies for approval to legislative and organisational requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Submit strategies for approval to legislative and organisational requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Develop strategies for management of cultural resource
